markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Jeffrey John Wolf wins the Wolf vs Friend professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Cary Round Of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Wolf vs Friend professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Cary Round Of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Jeffrey John Wolf win the Wolf vs Friend: Round Of 32 match?
